package.name: nav2_lazy_theta_star_planner
package.description: Lazy Theta* any-angle global planner for Nav2 (nav2_core::GlobalPlanner). Upstream Nav2 ships standard (eager) Theta* in nav2_theta_star_planner; this adds the lazy variant (Nash, Koenig and Tovey, 2010) that defers line-of-sight checks to about one per expanded node, producing any-angle paths that are not confined to the 8 grid directions. Part of nav2_experimental_planner: planners not in upstream Nav2.
